character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A marooned boy who has been on the island for three years without Christian food, now interacting with Ben Gunn.

character_dossiers.name: Benjamin Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A marooned man who has been on the island for three years, made a boat, and interacts with Jim.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A gentleman referenced in the narrative, part of the crew's social hierarchy.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Quartermaster of Flint's crew, part of the mutiny group.

character_dossiers.name: Billy Bones
character_dossiers.biography: Mate of Flint's crew, part of the mutiny group.
